nasb.text: Whatever is commanded by the God of heaven, let it be done with zeal for the house of the God of heaven, so that there will not be wrath against the kingdom of the king and his sons.

esv.text: Whatever is decreed by the God of heaven, let it be done in full for the house of the God of heaven, lest his wrath be against the realm of the king and his sons.

cnv.text: 天上的　神命令的，就要為天上　神的殿熱心去作，免得忿怒臨到王和王的子孫的國。

ccb.text: 不论天上的上帝为祂的殿有何要求，都要认真办理，以免祂的烈怒临到王及众王子的国。
